summary: First test run for Jewelry Shop Invoicing MVP. Backend 8/8 pytest passed (health, stock listing, stock 503 unavailable, invoice creation with correct VAT math, invoice increments, no-VAT path, sorted list, email graceful failure). Frontend UI loads with dual-pane layout, live datetime ticks, validation works, fetch stock handles 503 gracefully, discount sync (both directions) works, VAT toggle reflects in preview, New resets form, tablet view responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: fetch_sheet_rows() uses synchronous `requests.get` inside async endpoints (get_stock / list_stock). Under load this blocks the event loop. Consider httpx.AsyncClient or asyncio.to_thread.
server.py: on every /api/stock/{card} call the CSV is re-fetched (no caching). Add a TTL cache (e.g. 60s) to avoid hitting Google Sheets on each keystroke.
server.py: @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in recent FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handler.

server.py: Invoice math in create_invoice overrides client-supplied subtotal/total correctly (good). However discount_percent is always recomputed from amount — the frontend's percent-first entry is implicitly trusted only via amount. OK given current UI, but noted.

App.js: stockPrice field is not user-editable — only populated via fetchStock. With empty sheet, user is fully blocked from creating an invoice from the UI (backend POST works). Consider adding a manual override or flagging in UI.
App.js: discount % input has max=100 but discount amount has no upper bound vs stock_price; large discount > stock_price clamps subtotal to 0 (handled), but UX could warn.
InvoicePreview.jsx: not viewed but referenced — verify A4 print CSS works in Chrome/Safari.
No unit tests for frontend; relying on backend + integration only.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_ prefixed invoices created in MongoDB 'invoices' collection during pytest runs (TEST_Jane Doe, TEST_IncA, TEST_IncB, TEST_NoVat, TEST_EmailFail). No cleanup endpoint exists; consider adding one or clear manually if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Sheet URL is empty — /api/stock returns count=0, /api/stock/{any} returns 503. Resend in testing mode cannot deliver to external addresses, so email_sent=false is expected. Backend math verified: stock_price=150000, discount=15000, vat=true → subtotal=135000, vat=24300, total=159300. Invoice counter in MongoDB 'counters' collection (_id='invoice'). Full frontend submit flow requires stock_price>0 which only fetchStock can populate (empty sheet blocks this). Backend POST /api/invoices works independently and is covered by pytest.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. All expected behaviors verified against the review request.
